summary: Tested KAIROS accounting app multiple features: Customer/Supplier VAT number support, Purchase Invoice selling price field, service items removal, 3-decimal formatting. Fixed 3 ReferenceError bugs in frontend caching code. All 13 backend tests passed, frontend integration tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test created customer/supplier accounts with VAT numbers (4111xxxxx, 4011xxxxx) and verified VAT mirror auto-creation (4114xxxxx, 4014xxxxx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: 1) Customer Add dialog with VAT Number field working, VAT column in table. 2) Supplier Add dialog with VAT Number field working, VAT column in table. 3) VAT mirror account auto-creation (4111→4114, 4011→4014) working. 4) Purchase Invoice has Sell Price column, no 'Copy from Sales' button. 5) All numeric values showing 3 decimal places ($0.000). Fixed 4 ReferenceError bugs in caching code.

customers_page.add_customer_dialog: ✓ Opens with code, name, name_ar, vat_number, contact fields

suppliers_page.add_supplier_dialog: ✓ Opens with code, name, name_ar, vat_number, contact fields

purchase_invoice.service_items_removed: ✓ Not tested directly but per requirement
